changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md to instruct the model to write and execute a Node.js solver script instead of computing schedules by hand. Provided a complete solver template with correct downtime avoidance logic (loop-based shift past overlapping windows). Simplified from pseudocode + theory to a concrete runnable template. Added explicit instruction: 'Never compute schedules by hand.'

root_cause: Baseline skill used pseudocode with a buggy downtime check. devstral-small attempted to compute the schedule mentally rather than writing code, causing machine conflicts and downtime violations. Providing a complete Node.js solver template eliminated both issues.
